workspace.descriptionOverview: Manage the chart of accounts used by your organization, keeping the structure clean, auditable, and ready for reporting.
workspace.descriptionAccounting: Shape the accounting structure, refine parent-child relationships, and maintain a reliable chart of accounts for books, journals, and reporting.
workspace.controlCenterText: Create, edit, or reset accounts while preserving a clear accounting structure.
workspace.deleteAllError: Could not delete all ledger accounts.
workspace.searchPlaceholder: Search by code, name, description or external reference
workspace.summaryPostingSubtitle: Accounts that can receive journal lines.
workspace.summaryBankSubtitle: Posting accounts mapped to operational bank balances.
workspace.summaryManualSubtitle: Accounts that allow manual journal posting.
workspace.treeSubtitle: A unified view of your accounting structure.
workspace.emptySubtitle: Try adjusting filters or create the first account.
workspace.requestError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

setup.descriptionCompact: Compact cashflow view is enabled. Start with a smaller chart and expand later if needed.
setup.descriptionPersonal: Start with a clean personal structure and adapt it only where you need more detail.
setup.descriptionOrganizational: Start with a practical business-ready chart of accounts and then refine it for your organization.
setup.standardDescription: Load a generic chart of accounts designed as a strong starting point.
setup.uploadDescription: Upload a chart using the provided template headers.
setup.manualDescription: Paste delimited rows when you want to bootstrap quickly from text.
setup.permissionError: You do not have permission to manage ledger accounts.

accounting.title: Accounting workspace
accounting.description: A dedicated accounting surface for maintaining the chart of accounts and preparing the structure for journals, books, and reporting.
